languages.original_text: "To continue our conversation about poetry, noble Astartes. I have analysed the verse form recorded from your words and, with the help of Nuncius, slightly corrected the rhythm. Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."

languages.text: "В продолжение разговора о поэзии, почтенный Астартес. Я проанализировал записанную с ваших слов стихотворную форму и при помощи Нунциуса слегка исправил ритм. Теперь четные строки рифмуются через ассонансы, а нечетные через созвучия, что благотворно сказалось на ее структуре".

"To continue our conversation about poetry, noble Astartes. I have analysed the verse form recorded from your words and, with the help of Nuncius, slightly corrected the rhythm. Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."

Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."

Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."

"To continue our conversation about poetry, noble Astartes. I have analysed the verse form recorded from your words and, with the help of Nuncius, slightly corrected the rhythm. Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."

languages.text: «Quería continuar nuestra conversación sobre la poesía, noble Astartes. He analizado la forma de los versos registrados en sus palabras y, con ayuda de Nuncius, corregido ligeramente el ritmo. Ahora, las líneas pares tienen rima asonante, y las impares, consonante, lo que tiene un efecto positivo sobre la estructura».
languages.original_text: "To continue our conversation about poetry, noble Astartes. I have analysed the verse form recorded from your words and, with the help of Nuncius, slightly corrected the rhythm. Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."

traits.locale_text: «Quería continuar nuestra conversación sobre la poesía, noble Astartes. He analizado la forma de los versos registrados en sus palabras y, con ayuda de Nuncius, corregido ligeramente el ritmo. Ahora, las líneas pares tienen rima asonante, y las impares, consonante, lo que tiene un efecto positivo sobre la estructura».

languages.text: 「我々の詩についての対話を続けましょう、高貴なるアスタルテスよ。あなたの言葉から記録した韻文の形式を分析し、ヌンキウスの助けを借りて、韻律を少々修正しました。今では偶数行が母音韻で、奇数行が子音韻で韻を踏んでおり、その構造に好ましい効果が表れています」
languages.original_text: "To continue our conversation about poetry, noble Astartes. I have analysed the verse form recorded from your words and, with the help of Nuncius, slightly corrected the rhythm. Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."

traits.locale_text: 「我々の詩についての対話を続けましょう、高貴なるアスタルテスよ。あなたの言葉から記録した韻文の形式を分析し、ヌンキウスの助けを借りて、韻律を少々修正しました。今では偶数行が母音韻で、奇数行が子音韻で韻を踏んでおり、その構造に好ましい効果が表れています」

languages.text: “继续我们关于诗歌的对话吧，尊贵的阿斯塔特。我分析了你言语记录中的诗歌形式，并在努恩修斯的帮助下略微修正了韵律。现在偶数行通过元音押韵，奇数行通过辅音押韵，这对其结构产生了正面效果。”
languages.original_text: "To continue our conversation about poetry, noble Astartes. I have analysed the verse form recorded from your words and, with the help of Nuncius, slightly corrected the rhythm. Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."

traits.locale_text: “继续我们关于诗歌的对话吧，尊贵的阿斯塔特。我分析了你言语记录中的诗歌形式，并在努恩修斯的帮助下略微修正了韵律。现在偶数行通过元音押韵，奇数行通过辅音押韵，这对其结构产生了正面效果。”

languages.text: "Was unser Gespräch über Poesie angeht, edler Astartes ... Ich habe die Versform Eurer Worte analysiert und mit Nunciuis' Hilfe den Rhythmus geringfügig korrigiert. Jetzt reimen sich die geraden Zeilen durch Assonanz, due ungeraden durch Konsonanz, was sich wiederum positiv auf die Struktur auswirkt."
languages.original_text: "To continue our conversation about poetry, noble Astartes. I have analysed the verse form recorded from your words and, with the help of Nuncius, slightly corrected the rhythm. Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."

traits.locale_text: "Was unser Gespräch über Poesie angeht, edler Astartes ... Ich habe die Versform Eurer Worte analysiert und mit Nunciuis' Hilfe den Rhythmus geringfügig korrigiert. Jetzt reimen sich die geraden Zeilen durch Assonanz, due ungeraden durch Konsonanz, was sich wiederum positiv auf die Struktur auswirkt."

languages.text: « À propos de notre discussion sur la poésie, noble guerrier de l'Astartes... J'ai analysé les vers que vous m'avez déclamés, et, avec l'aide de Nuncius, j'ai apporté de légères modifications au rythme. À présent, les lignes paires riment par assonance, tandis que les lignes impaires riment par consonance. Cet effet a un impact positif sur la structure du tout. »
languages.original_text: "To continue our conversation about poetry, noble Astartes. I have analysed the verse form recorded from your words and, with the help of Nuncius, slightly corrected the rhythm. Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."

traits.locale_text: « À propos de notre discussion sur la poésie, noble guerrier de l'Astartes... J'ai analysé les vers que vous m'avez déclamés, et, avec l'aide de Nuncius, j'ai apporté de légères modifications au rythme. À présent, les lignes paires riment par assonance, tandis que les lignes impaires riment par consonance. Cet effet a un impact positif sur la structure du tout. »

languages.text: "Şiir hakkındaki konuşmamıza devam edecek olursak soylu Astartes. Sözlerinizden kaydedilen şiir formunu analiz ettim ve Nuncius'un yardımıyla ritmi biraz düzelttim. Artık çift sayılı dizeler asonans, tek sayılı dizeler ise konsonans yoluyla uyaklanıyor. Bu da yapı üzerinde olumlu bir etki yarattı."
languages.original_text: "To continue our conversation about poetry, noble Astartes. Now the even-numbered lines rhyme through assonance and the odd-numbered lines through consonance, which has had a positive effect on its structure."
